recentpagestats-legend: Legend for the filter form on Special:RecentPageStats
recentpagestats-days-label: Label for the days input field
recentpagestats-namespace-main: Display name for the main namespace (NS_MAIN)
recentpagestats-sort-time: Option to sort by most recent edit time
recentpagestats-sort-count: Option to sort by number of edits
recentpagestats-submit: Submit button text for the filter form, used on both special pages
recentpagestats-refresh: Button text to refresh data and bypass cache, used on both special pages
recentpagestats-header-page: Table column header for page title
recentpagestats-header-editor: Table column header for last editor
recentpagestats-header-lasttime: Table column header for timestamp of last edit
recentpagestats-header-editcount: Table column header for number of edits in the selected period
recentpagestats-header-pagesize: Table column header for page size in bytes or KB
recentpagestats-includeminor-label: Label for checkbox to include or exclude minor edits from results, used on both special pages
recentpagestats-no-results: Message displayed when no pages match the filter criteria
recentpagestats-unknown-user: Text displayed when the user who made the last edit cannot be determined
recentpagestats-see-dashboard: Navigation text linking to Special:RecentChangesStats. $1 is the link.
recentchangesstats-legend: Legend for the filter form on Special:RecentChangesStats
recentchangesstats-see-pagestats: Navigation text linking to Special:RecentPageStats. $1 is the link.
recentchangesstats-no-data: Message displayed when no recent changes data is found
recentchangesstats-summary-title: Heading for the summary cards section
recentchangesstats-total-edits: Card label for total number of edits
recentchangesstats-total-pages: Card label for total number of pages edited
recentchangesstats-unique-editors: Card label for number of unique editors
recentchangesstats-new-pages: Card label for number of new pages created
recentchangesstats-minor-edits: Card label for number of minor edits
recentchangesstats-avg-edits: Card label for average edits per page
recentchangesstats-namespace-title: Heading for the namespace breakdown table
recentchangesstats-ns-edits: Column header for edit count per namespace
recentchangesstats-ns-pages: Column header for page count per namespace
recentchangesstats-ns-editors: Column header for editor count per namespace
recentchangesstats-topeditors-title: Heading for the top editors table
recentchangesstats-editor-edits: Column header for number of edits by editor
recentchangesstats-editor-pages: Column header for number of pages edited by editor
recentchangesstats-daily-title: Heading for the daily activity table
recentchangesstats-daily-date: Column header for date in daily activity
recentchangesstats-daily-edits: Column header for edits per day
recentchangesstats-daily-pages: Column header for pages edited per day
recentchangesstats-daily-editors: Column header for editors active per day
recentchangesstats-daily-activity: Column header for visual activity bar
